/usr/bin/ar qc libnet.a CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/event_result.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/operation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/uring_multiplexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/ip/v4_address.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/ip/v4_endpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/sockets/datagram_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/sockets/pipe_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/sockets/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/sockets/stream_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/sockets/tcp_accept_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/sockets/tcp_stream_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/net/sockets/udp_datagram_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/util/binary_deserializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/util/binary_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/util/cli_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/util/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/util/error_code.cpp.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/src/util/error.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnet.a
